summary: Comprehensive frontend UI/integration testing of static Astro calculators site. All 24 routes return 200, all 5 categories + 18 calculators load with breadcrumbs, FAQ blocks and CalculatorIsland. Search (кредит → credit-calculator), credit/BMI/age/tile calculations all produce correct results. SEO JSON-LD types per page match spec exactly (Home: WebSite+Organization; Category: FAQPage+BreadcrumbList; Calculator: WebApplication+FAQPage+BreadcrumbList). Analytics scripts correctly ABSENT when PUBLIC_GA_ID/PUBLIC_YM_ID are empty. Mobile (375px) has no horizontal scroll. Breadcrumbs navigate back to / and /finance/. Footer present on all pages with links to all 5 categories.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid is 'search-input' but the review spec/PRD declares 'search-box-input'. Mismatch breaks any E2E tests targeting the spec selector.
Item testids are 'breadcrumb-{i}' but spec declares pattern 'breadcrumbs-*'. Root 'breadcrumbs' is correct.
Component exists with correct testid 'ad-placeholder-{slot}' but is NOT imported/used in any page/layout. No ad placeholders are actually rendered.

integration_issues.issue: Both /robots.txt and /sitemap-index.xml return 404 from the Astro dev server. They DO exist in production build (/app/frontend/dist/robots.txt, sitemap-0.xml, sitemap-index.xml) because robots.txt.ts uses prerender=true and @astrojs/sitemap integration only emits during astro build. Expected static behavior, but spec asks to verify /robots.txt accessibility - this only works on the built site, not dev preview.

action_items: Align data-testid naming with PRD/review spec: rename 'search-input' → 'search-box-input', 'calc-submit-btn' → 'calculator-run-button', 'calc-result' → 'calculator-result', 'breadcrumb-{i}' → 'breadcrumbs-{i}'. Update vitest unit tests accordingly.
Decide whether AdPlaceholder should be inserted into category/calculator pages (it is fully implemented but currently dead code).
Optional: clarify in docs that /robots.txt and /sitemap-index.xml are emitted at build time only (yarn build); they 404 under astro dev which is expected static-site behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: Spec/code drift: the review spec lists testids ('search-box-input', 'calculator-run-button', 'calculator-result', 'breadcrumbs-*') that do not exist in the source. Either the spec or the components need to be reconciled. Recommend updating components since the spec uses more descriptive names.

Credit calculator term field defaults to 'Лет' (years) toggle. When a user types '60' expecting months they get 720 months. Consider switching default to месяцев or making the toggle more prominent. Functional correctness is fine, but UX may mislead.
AdPlaceholder.astro is dead code — implemented but never imported. Either wire it in or remove to reduce surface area.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (functional flows fully pass; only testid naming drift vs spec)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Static Astro + React Islands site. Dev server at http://localhost:3000. All 24 routes load 200. Real data-testid values present in source: search-box (root)/search-input/search-results/search-result-{i} (SearchBox), calc-form/calc-submit-btn/calc-reset-btn/calc-result/calc-result-primary/calc-result-row-{i}/calc-result-wrap/calculator-island-{calcId} (CalculatorIsland), field-{name}/field-label-{name}/field-{name}-opt-{val} (inputs), breadcrumbs/breadcrumb-{i} (Breadcrumbs), analytics-ga-init/analytics-ym-init (Analytics — only rendered when env IDs set; both empty in /app/frontend/.env so currently absent). robots.txt + sitemap-*.xml only exist after yarn build (in /app/frontend/dist/). 16 calculators (sport=4, finance=4, currency=4, building=4, date-time=2) — count is 18 routes total per spec but there are 16 calculators per PRD comment. All categories show 4 calculators except date-time which shows 2 (16 total, matching the 'home-about' caption '18 калькуляторов' — possible discrepancy in copy).
rca of the issue: Testid mismatch: the source files use shorter testid names ('search-input', 'calc-submit-btn', 'calc-result', 'breadcrumb-{i}'). The review spec lists names with longer prefixes ('search-box-input', 'calculator-run-button', 'calculator-result', 'breadcrumbs-*'). Functionality is unaffected, but any external test harness using the spec's selectors will fail. Fix: search/replace in SearchBox.tsx (line 38), CalculatorIsland.tsx (lines 38, 296), Breadcrumbs.astro (lines 21, 25) and corresponding vitest tests.
